fields.title: Apply Ralph execution contract to owned sessions
fields.description: Ralph-owned controller and child sessions should run with the execution contract pinned in loop state instead of inheriting whatever tools or runtime mode Pi currently has selected.
fields.design: Add a Ralph contract applier used at session_start, before_agent_start, and child-session creation boundaries. When a session is owned by an active Ralph loop, load the loop state, validate the contract against current Pi tool availability, set active tools to the pinned tool names, apply the pinned ExecutionProfile ephemerally, and keep ralph_continue/ralph_finish availability driven by child ownership. If required tools are unavailable, pause or block the loop with a clear message rather than falling back.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Ralph child sessions receive the pinned model/thinking/tool set before the iteration prompt is delivered, controller sessions regain the Ralph contract when resumed, unavailable pinned tools fail visibly, and regression tests cover ambient Pi tool changes not leaking into Ralph child sessions.
